title: heterotrichum viscosum
intro: Heterotrichum viscosum, also known as the sticky club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lycopodiopsida family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Heterotrichum viscosum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
